---
title: "Main_data_cleaning"
author: "MIKE"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# clean data

```{r}
my_data_raw = read.csv("depression_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = TRUE)


removes = c("Name")
my_data[removes] = NULL

# split into a more manageable portion of the dataset
my_data <- my_data_raw[sample(1:nrow(my_data_raw), 0.1*nrow(my_data_raw)), ]


my_data$Name <- NULL

char_cols <- sapply(my_data, is.character)
my_data[char_cols] <- lapply(my_data[char_cols], as.factor)


str(my_data)
summary(my_data)
```

# export

```{r}
saveRDS(my_data, file = "cleaned_depression.rds")

nrow(my_data)
```
